title: Business Analyst, Digital Platforms (1 year contract)
description:
• Opportunity to work in a Global Financial Institution
  • Drive impact through supporting digital product launches

About Our Client

Our client is a leading financial services and insurance provider, committed to redefining how consumers achieve financial freedom. Through innovative, technology-enabled solutions and a comprehensive suite of insurance and financial products, they empower individuals with greater control over their financial well-being at every stage of life.

Job Description

Key Responsibilities:

  • Partner with business stakeholders to gather, analyse, and translate requirements into clear product deliverables
  • Review existing processes and identify opportunities for optimisation and enhancement
  • Support delivery of strategic and tactical initiatives using Agile methodologies
  • Manage and prioritise the product backlog and roadmap in line with business needs
  • Create user stories and acceptance criteria, and lead User Acceptance Testing
  • Track delivery progress to ensure timely execution and compliance with regulatory requirements

The Successful Applicant

A successful candidate should have:

  • Degree in Business or a related discipline
  • At least 3-5 years of experience as a Business Analyst or Product Owner within financial services or insurance
  • Working knowledge of Agile delivery and project tools such as Jira and Confluence
  • Proven experience delivering or rolling out digital initiatives and projects
  • Strong analytical and conceptual thinking with a solution-oriented mindset
  • Able to work cross-functionally in a fast-paced environment; adaptable, detail-oriented, and eager to learn

What's on Offer

Why this role?

  • Exposure to end-to-end product delivery, partnering closely with Product Owners and cross-functional teams
  • Collaborative, agile-driven environment that supports continuous learning and innovation
  • Career development through hands-on involvement in business and technology transformation
  • Competitive remuneration and benefits within a regulated financial services environment

Contact
